hero.headline:
39 Years of Backyard Relaxation,
Perfected
hero.subheadline: From hot tubs and pools to game rooms and saunas, Elko Spas has helped Myrtle Beach families create their perfect backyard escape since 1987. Award-winning products, no-pressure guidance, and service that keeps everything running beautifully.
checkmarks: Try before you buy -- demos available
Full sales, install & service under one roof

services.label: What We Offer
services.headline: Everything for Your Backyard<br class="hidden md:block"> Relaxation & Entertainment
services.subtitle: From the moment you step into our showroom to years after your purchase, Elko Spas is your single source for premium backyard living.

cards.title: Hot Tubs & Swim Spas
cards.description: Premium Hot Spring and PDC spas with test-and-demo opportunities. Our relaxation specialists help you find the perfect fit for your lifestyle and budget.

cards.title: Pool Sales & Installation
cards.description: Above-ground and inground pools from Doughboy, Embassy, Imagine, and Alaglas. Professional installation and design for your dream backyard.

cards.title: Spa & Pool Service
cards.description: Expert repair, maintenance, and water care for hot tubs and pools. Leak detection, jet replacement, chemical balancing -- we keep it all running perfectly.

cards.title: Billiards & Game Rooms
cards.description: Olhausen billiard tables, shuffleboards, foosball, air hockey, and more. Complete game room design, delivery, setup, and re-felting services.

cards.title: Saunas & Wellness
cards.description: High-quality Tylo saunas for home wellness and relaxation. Expert guidance on selection, placement, and installation for your personal retreat.

cards.title: Backyard Design
cards.description: Professional consultation to plan your ideal outdoor living space. We combine pools, spas, and entertainment into one cohesive backyard escape.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Dream Backyard

steps.title: Visit Our Showroom
steps.description: Walk through our Myrtle Beach showroom and experience our products firsthand. Test hot tubs, explore pool options, and try game room equipment -- all in a relaxed, no-pressure environment.

steps.title: We Design Your Plan
steps.description: Our relaxation specialists create a personalized recommendation based on your space, lifestyle, and budget. We carry only products that meet our strict quality standards.

steps.title: Relax & Enjoy
steps.description: From professional delivery and installation to ongoing service and maintenance, we handle everything. You just enjoy your backyard -- that's what it's there for.

about.label: Why Grand Strand Families Trust Us
about.headline: Not Just a Store -- Your Backyard Partner for Life
about.description: Since 1987, Elko Spas has been the Myrtle Beach area's most trusted name in backyard relaxation. We have earned multiple National Hot Spring Dealer of the Year Awards, Gold Dealer Awards, and the 2024 AQUA 100 designation as one of the top pool and spa retailers in the nation. Our team carefully researches every product to meet strict quality standards, so you never have to wonder if you are getting the best.

features.title: No-Pressure Shopping Experience
features.description: We believe in educating, not selling. Our relaxation specialists guide you through options honestly so you make the right choice for your family.

features.title: Test Before You Buy
features.description: Our showroom lets you experience hot tubs, swim spas, and game room equipment firsthand. Feel the difference quality makes before you commit.

features.title: Full-Service From Day One
features.description: Sales, delivery, installation, maintenance, and repairs -- all under one roof. One call handles everything for the life of your product.

pricing.headline: Fair Pricing on Premium Products.
pricing.subtitle: We carry only the highest quality brands, priced fairly. Financing and trade-in programs available to fit your budget.

guarantee.headline: Our "Relaxation Promise" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If any product or service does not meet your expectations, we make it right -- period. With nearly four decades of award-winning service behind us and 719+ five-star reviews, your satisfaction is not just a goal, it is our founding principle. We stand behind every product we sell and every service call we make.

faqs.question: Can I try a hot tub before buying?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! Our Myrtle Beach showroom has multiple hot tubs and swim spas ready for you to test. We encourage every customer to experience the product firsthand before making a decision.

faqs.question: Do you offer financing or trade-ins?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer flexible financing options and a trade-in program for your existing hot tub or spa. Our team will walk you through all available options to find the best fit for your budget.

faqs.question: What brands do you carry?
faqs.answer: We carry premium brands including Hot Spring and PDC spas, Doughboy and Alaglas pools, Olhausen billiard tables, and Tylo saunas. Every product meets our strict quality standards before it reaches our showroom floor.

faqs.question: Do you service spas and pools you didn't sell?
faqs.answer: Yes, our trained technicians service and repair most major brands of hot tubs and pools, regardless of where they were purchased. We are here to help the entire Grand Strand community.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Myrtle Beach, Surfside Beach, North Myrtle Beach, Conway, Pawleys Island, Litchfield Beach, Garden City, and the entire Grand Strand area of South Carolina.

testimonials.name: Anne K.
testimonials.text: So easy to maintain and feels so good on your skin. We love our hot tub from Elko Spas!

testimonials.name: Gordon T.
testimonials.text: Quality products, competitive pricing, and great people. Elko Spas is the best in Myrtle Beach.

testimonials.name: Kevin Lemmons
testimonials.text: From scheduling to repair, it was done professionally and well. Billy replaced non-functioning jets. Definitely 5 stars.
